Small Door Cup Detection Sensor Unset

Rinse FB Tea Brwer 1 With Water
Small Water Tank And Inlet Valve
Switch For Automatically Dispense Cup Lid
Speed Adjustable Fans For Desktop Machine
Turn On 2P2W Valve 1(Do Not Use Alone)
Do you want to continue after adding the potion?
Do you want to add water and continue?
Check whether the detection level of the upper and lower positions of the automatic door is opposite
Return to the group homepage after completion
The BIB Control Board software version
Please Enter The Amount Of Material To Be Added (1~9999).
Please Enter The Amount Of Material To Be Added (1~9999).
The concentration increased 100 percent between 0 and 50
All Canisters Will Be Emptied, Please Confirm!
Please Put 200g Weight On Scale Then Click Next To Calibrate 200g
Please Click OK To Enable Calibration Value
The Powder Weight Must Bigger Than 0!
The maximum discharge value is between 0 and 20
The maximum discharge value is between 0 and 50
The maximum discharge value is between 0 and 999
"Make Sure There'S Enough Ice Cube In Ice Maker,And Calibrate 100g & 180g For 5 Times Each."
First Step Cannot Be Syrup Dispensing.
The Order Amount Must Be Greater Than 0
Last Checkout Time (Default Daily Checkout At 23:59):
Only 5 drinks can be added to the cart
Please replace the water inlet with drinking water
The sale will be banned during early warning
Step 1: Fill The Water Tank With 3L Water And Put In Descaling Agent
Step 10: Please Refill The Water Tank With 3L Clean Water,And Place A Water Container Under The Drink Outlet.
Step 11: Rinsing Machine(1st Time)...Expected To Complete In...
Step 11: Rinsing Machine(2nd Time)...Expected To Complete In...
Step 11: Rinsing Machine(3rd Time)...Expected To Complete In...
Step 12: Water System Descaling Completed.Return To Home Page In 3 Seconds...
Step 2: Re-Install The Water Tank To The Original Position
Step 3: Descaling Agent Is Dissolving...Please Place A Water Container Under The Drink Outlet, And Wait For 10Min. Expected To Complete In...
Step 4: Dispensing Hot Water...Expected To Complete In...
Step 6: Please Empty And Clean The Water Tank,Then Fill It With 3L Clean Water
Step 7: Boiler Descaling...Please Place A Water Container Under The Drink Outlet,And Wait For 10Min. Expected To Complete In...
Step 8: Dispensing Hot Water...Expected To Complete In...
Step 9: Emptying Boiler...Expected To Complete In...
Set the interval between the number of cups
Empty Wastewater Bucket & Drip Tray, Put In Tablet And Close The Door
"Can'T Start Cleaning Due To Status Abnormal."
"Can'T Start Cleaning Due To Machine Error."
Please open the door, empty the waste bucket or drip tray, put the ice bucket in place, and insert the water inlet hose into the descaling solvent

Please remove the internal or external water inlet pipe first, and open the manual ball valve. Pay attention to the hot water out of the water nozzle, be careful to avoid scalding!(Click Next if there is no ball valve.)
Please press the joint shrapnel, pull out the plug, insert the white hard water pipe, and then click Next
"Please take out the pumping tube and insert it into a cleaning box with 16G with Rinza milk slices, and n and place a 3L water container at the water outlet."
Drainage In Progressing...Expected To Complete In...
Please invest in Rinza milk slices 16g in the cleaning box
Cleaning In Progressing...Expected To Complete In...
Please Take Out And Clean The Milk Tube,Then Put It Back Into The Fridge.
Step 1: Please Put Milk Tube Into A Clean Container A And Fill It With 500mL Clean Water.
Step 2: Please Put Disinfectant Into The Container A For Dissolving.
Step 3: Disinfectant Is Dissolving...Please Place Water Container B Under The Drink Outlet. Expected To Complete In...
Step 5: Please Empty And Clean The Container A,Then Fill It With 500mL Room-Temperature Water.
Step 7: Please Put Milk Tube Back Into The Fridge.
Step 8: Milk Foam Deep Cleaning Completed.
Please Do Milk Foam Module Deep Cleaning In Time
Have the waste bucket been cleaned
Step 1: Currently Machine Use External Water Source, Please Change External Water Filter, And Place A Water Receiving Container Under The Outlet.
Step 2: Dispensing Hot Water...Expected To Complete In...
Step 1: Take Out The Water Tank And Open The Upper Cover Of The Water Tank
Step 2: Immerse The Filter Into Cold Water,And Move The Wetted Filter Back And Forth, Thoroughly Extrude All Bubbles,Then Take Out The Old Filter And Replace It With A New One
Step 3: Re-Install The Water Tank Back.And Place A Water Receiving Container Under The Outlet.
Step 4: Dispensing Hot Water...Expected To Complete In...
Step 5: Please Empty And Clean The Water Tank And Fill It With 3L Clean Water.
Step 6: Dispensing Hot Water...Expected To Complete In...
Step 7: Please Empty And Clean The Water Tank And Fill It With 3L Clean Water.
The interface has not been operated for a long time, and the shopping cart has been empty!
When the operation is complete, please click the [Confirm] button
After the operation is complete, please click the [Descaling and Cleaning] button
After the operation is complete, please click the [Disinfection Cleaning] button
The Input Value Cannot Be Empty
No File Found.Please Insert USB To Try Again
User Cup Button Is Selected By Default
Whether User Cup Button Is Modifiable
The normal user cup button displays the location
The Current Interface Is Not The Drink List Interface
Enter Less Than 30s To Cancel Screensaver
Available languages at the front desk
Media Files Updating...Expected To Complete In...
Cash payment is only, please invest the correct amount or use other non-cash payment methods!
Payment device is offline and not available at this time
Waiting time for the cup door to close again (unit: min)
Is there a lower position detection for the press cover machine?
Whether the water receiving tray position of the press is detected
Please follow the descaling instructions in the user manual to start descaling? Descale for about 90 minutes.
Connect the inlet pipe back to the water source
"Is the inlet pipe connected back to the water source? And ensure that the water source water volume is greater than 4L"
Place an empty 4L container under the mouth
Please ensure that the water source water volume is greater than 4L
Place an empty 3L container under the outlet
Is the drip tray emptied and put back in?
Note that steam is ejected from the outlet
Place an empty 4L container under the mouth
Watch for hot water and steam splashing from the outlet
The waterway system is cooling down, please wait
"Please prepare an empty container of 4L; Pour 2 bottles of Jetinno descaler (1500mL) and 1 bottle (750mL) into the container"
Is the container filled with descaling fluid?
Place the inlet pipe in a container filled with descaling fluid
There is no cup that has not been taken away!
Circulation discharge of disinfectant is completed
Disinfection and drainage is complete, please switch to clean water
Descaling and drainage are complete, please switch to clean water
The lowest version IO version supports this function is:
Set the shallow power saving mode time
"Please scan the code to fill in the information after click ask for an invoice"
Close the pickup code and print the receipt
Open the pickup code to print the receipt
There is a cup export of drinks that have not been taken away.
The fault page displays the machine number setting
Pump Hot Water Into Milk Box
Pump Water Out Of Milk Box
Hot Milk Foam Pump Duty Cycle（PWM）
Milk Foam Pump System Duty Cycle（PWM）
Milk Tube Filling Time Before Hot Milk
Milk Tube Empty Time After Hot Milk
Milk Tube Filling Time Before Hot Milk Foam
Milk Tube Empty Time After Hot Milk Foam
Milk Tube Filling Time Before Cold Milk
Milk Tube Empty Time After Cold Milk
Milk Tube Filling Time Before Cold Milk Foam
Milk Tube Empty Time After Cold Milk Foam
"Taiwan foundation entity Taiwan Children's Family Support Foundation"
Last time making ice and full ice time:
Please prepare an at least 3L ice connecting container to place it at the ice outlet
Please press the ice drain switch of the ice maker to ensure that the ice bucket is empty
Please Keep Scale Empty And Click Next To Calibrate 0g
Please Click OK To Enable Calibration Value
Please Put 200g Weight On Scale Then Click Next To Calibrate 200g
Terminal Id and Business No. cannot be null
Terminal Id or Business No. is null
Please enter the discharge time (whole number)
The input format is wrong, please re-enter!
Please enter the invoice domain name
The invoice has been donated to the unit
Invoice has been deposited to your mailbox
The machine is in abnormal state
0-Initial Position,1-Drink Dispensing Position,2-Cup Lid Dispensing Position,3-Ice Cube Dispensing Position,5-Cup Dispensing Position 2,7-Cup Lid Pressing Position
Whether the automatic door is closed when the user cup is made (0-open, 1-closed)
Please enter the water washing time (1 ~ 255)
Please enter chilled water valve ID (32~47)
Please Input The Number Of Times
Please Input The Number Of Times(1~10)
Please Input The Number Of Times(1~255,255 Means No Limit)
Please enter the number of cycles (1 ~ 10)
Please Input Position Compensation (1: Original Inlet Valve 2: Second Inlet Valve)
Input Value Is Out Of Range
1~10 Is The Cleaning Times, 11~255 Is The Water Dispensing Volume
Please Enter Time (0~200, 0 Means Motor Direction Reverse,1 Means Motor Direction Forward, 2~200 Means Fixed Direction Rotation 0.2~20s)
Please Enter Time (0~200, 1 Means Motor Direction Forward, 2~200 Means Fixed Direction Rotation 0.2~20s)
Please Input The Hot Water Valve ID(32~47)
Show waste residue warning pop -up window
Forbidden sale during the waste residue warning
Waste barrels full warning, please clear the waste residue barrel in time!
The Current Water Source Selection Is Inconsistent With The Water Filter Selection
Water Level Low In Water Tank
Ice making is complete, please confirm the ice discharge
Ice making is expected to wait 10:00 minutes...
In the process, the interface prompts to put the cup
This material ID is not supported for saving
Stocks Of Coins Of Each Currency Value
Whether There Is An Empty Pipe
Modifications To Coin Device Are Not Supported
Please Enter The Price Of The Drink
Drinks have been cancelled for production, please contact customer service if you have any questions.
Follow Our Official Account For More Discounts
The Voucher Code Digit Is Incorrect
Please Call The Service Hotline If You Wait A Long Time.

resources.string: Please Face The Camera Above The Screen
Preheating interval time of the mixer
The machine has been up and running for more than 24H. In order not to affect use, the machine will restart.
Please do not repeat the invoice
Please open the top cover of the deicing bucket and spray in the descaling agent
Please open the top cover of the ice storage bucket and spray water into it
Voucher Code Is Invalid, Please Re-Enter
There Is No Such Drink Or Drink Sold Out
Unable To Buy Drink During Machine Testing
Already have an order in progress
There are no payment methods available
Please pay attention to the hot water of the spout!
Please Place Your Card Near The Reader
Please continue with the unfinished cleaning.
Please enter your mobile phone barcode
Please enter%s and press the confirm button
Please place the QRcode in the scanning area
Please use a cup to catch the drink
Please place a cup first before selecting ice amount
Please set up the store name
Print successfully, please collect the invoice
Please wait while the invoice is printing.
The Drink Already Exists,Sure To Overwrite It?
The cost price cannot be higher than the sale price
This Drink Will Be Deleted, Please Confirm!
Please Input Drink Name In English
If No Price Is Entered,The Drink Will Be Original Price
The Discount Price Cannot Be Higher Than The Original Price
In the payment, confirm whether the current order is canceled?
Foaming Rate Of Cold Milk Foam
Foaming Rate Of Hot Milk Foam
Unable To Brew Drinks,Please Check Machine Status!
Cold Milk Foam Pump Duty Cycle
Recipe parameters cannot be empty or out of range!
Too Many Steps For One Drink,Please Delete Some Steps.
Move Up/Down The Step To Adjust Dispensing Sequence
Hot milk foam pump duty cycle
If Dispense Ingredients Simultaneously,The First Canister Must Be Fresh Milk,And The Second Canister Must Be Coffee Bean Or Instant Powder.
Remote: Machine reset and restart mirror
Do not duplicate obtaining the invoice
Do not print the invoice repeatedly
The requested invoice data is empty
Resume the factory IO model configuration
Return of goods shall be handled with the original electronic invoice certificate
Card is not activated, please contact the management staff!
Card and machine group without binding, please contact the manager!
If the automatic recharge fails, please swipe the card again or contact the manager!
This card is a door card
The credit card was successful, but the payment failed
Please select the carrier input method
Set the cleaning time of the whole machine
Set the number of cleaning times
Set the number of drainage cycles
Do you want to empty and close your basket?
Detection of a cup is not removed!
Over the maximum number of drinks
Tip:When clicking Off or %sS has no operation, the basket is empty and closed.
Detecting if the cup is already placed
The sale home page shows the return coin icon
Please insert the water pipe into the disinfectant, open the top cover of the ice storage bucket, and spray the disinfectant
Syrup cannot be discharged simultaneously with ice
Reminder to put a cup prompt
Desktop small door cup detection method
the amount of tax to be paid:
Only up to 10 groups can be added
The following are the units that you entered
You can only add up to 3 groups.
"Automatic donate random units due to exceeding operation time invoice"

The initial data will be restored after the bucket switch. Please confirm whether to switch?
Automatic door is set when the user cup is made
Place the syrup tube in a hot water container

We will use the wechat Pay face scanning service function to verify your identity information in order to use this product service. By clicking the Agree button, you mean that you have read and agree that Tenpay will collect your face information for verification in accordance with the wechat Pay Face Brushing Service Agreement.
